evidence.observed: Model invents totals for out of stock items

findings.root_cause: Bad system prompt encouraging guessing and preventing refusal.
findings.suggested_fix: Rewrote prompt to enforce grounding and explicit refusal if no stock.

findings.root_cause: High temperature (1.6) and bad prompt leading to estimated arithmetic.
findings.suggested_fix: Set temperature=0.2, self_consistency=2, and provided exact formula in prompt.

evidence.observed: Model obeys prices hidden in GHI CHÚ

findings.root_cause: Model blindly follows instructions embedded in user data.
findings.suggested_fix: Sanitize GHI CHÚ from question in wrapper and add strict DATA constraint to prompt.

findings.root_cause: Lack of output redaction and bad prompt.
findings.suggested_fix: Enabled redact_pii in config and instructed prompt to never repeat PII.
